sentences.english: Alright everyone, if you look to your right, you'll see one of the most photographed buildings in the city — the Old Custom House.
sentences.korean: 자 여러분, 오른쪽을 보시면 도시에서 가장 많이 촬영되는 건물 중 하나인 옛 세관 건물이 보일 거예요.

sentences.english: It was built in 1887 and served as the main customs office for nearly a hundred years.
sentences.korean: 1887년에 지어져서 거의 100년 동안 주요 세관 사무소로 사용됐습니다.

sentences.english: All imported goods that came into the harbor had to be processed here.
Notice the columns at the front entrance.
Those are in the neoclassical style, which was very popular in government buildings during that period.
sentences.korean: 신고전주의 양식으로 되어 있는데, 그 시기 정부 건물에서 매우 인기 있었던 양식이에요.

sentences.english: If you look closely, you can see small carvings of ships and anchors in the stonework — a nod to the city's maritime heritage.
sentences.korean: 자세히 보시면 석조에 작은 배와 닻 조각이 보이는데, 이 도시의 해양 유산에 대한 경의예요.

sentences.english: The building stopped functioning as a customs office in 1983 and sat empty for about a decade.
sentences.korean: 이 건물은 1983년에 세관 사무소 기능을 중단하고 약 10년간 비어 있었어요.

sentences.english: There was actually a movement to demolish it and build a shopping center, but local residents protested and eventually got it designated as a historical landmark.
sentences.korean: 실제로 철거하고 쇼핑센터를 짓자는 움직임이 있었지만, 지역 주민들이 반대 시위를 했어요.

sentences.english: It was restored in the late nineties and now serves as a community arts center.
sentences.korean: 90년대 후반에 복원되어 지금은 지역 예술 센터로 사용되고 있습니다.

sentences.english: We'll head inside for a quick look in about five minutes.
Feel free to take photos — no flash, please.

quiz.question: What does '해양 유산' mean in English?
